claimBoundary: This V2 is an arithmetic-equivalence qualification of the retained V1 one-cell raster ties. It requires exact whole-surface direction counts and does not relax any histogram or response threshold. It can clear static D28/D32 direction support over 25-30 ms, but cannot validate moving-wall velocity, interpolation, realized populations, force magnitude, bird-load convergence, experimental agreement, quantitative bird flight, or free flight, and authorizes no production edit or D36 run.
nextAction: Apply the frozen histogram and fixed-profile response gates to all eleven pairs.
